topic_coverage.quoted_user_text: Planning mode fully functional: Start empty and add lines works; Compare shows logical sums with empty plan; plan-vs-actual returns 200 or documented empty-state when no active plan without breaking UX.
React /planning Scenarios Compare PlanVsActual; backend plans API active plan CRUD plan-vs-actual route; Plan Engine US-0004 scenario templates.
BUG-0004 documented 404 when no active plan; operator reports non-functional UX beyond empty-state; US-0004 DONE; epic UX deferred US-0014; do not read secrets.

Click Start empty and add lines creates editable plan; Compare tab empty plan shows zero deltas not -127489.44; GET /api/v1/plans/active/plan-vs-actual 200 with payload or explicit no-active-plan UX; scenario templates load.
Operator confirms planning intuitive and functional; BUG-0011 acceptance AD+AE+AF checked; US-0014 epic if full UX overhaul needed; OIDC regression pass.

decomposition.rationale: Operator issue 4: planning mode non-functional — 4a empty plan click no-op, 4b Compare illogical sums (-127489.44), 4c plan-vs-actual 404; sub-defects AD AE AF share /planning workflow; intuitive full UX deferred US-0014 if discovery exceeds defect fix scope.
alternatives_considered: Merge 404 into BUG-0004 out-of-scope note — rejected (operator expects functional planning, not silent 404)
